testcase.name: test_shared_clip_throttle_does_not_double_fire

failure.message: AssertionError: First hit should have set last_view_notify_at assert ({'last_view_notify_at': None} and None) + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf967a4234b40>('last_view_notify_at') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf967a4234b40> = {'last_view_notify_at': None}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_push_notifications.py:324: in test_shared_clip_throttle_does_not_double_fire _run(_check()) tests/test_push_notifications.py:27: in _run return _LOOP.run_until_complete(coro) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:654: in run_until_complete return future.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_push_notifications.py:314: in _check assert doc and doc.get("last_view_notify_at"), "First hit should have set last_view_notify_at" E AssertionError: First hit should have set last_view_notify_at E assert ({'last_view_notify_at': None} and None) E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf967a4234b40>('last_view_notify_at') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf967a4234b40> = {'last_view_notify_at': None}.get
